name: Quick Attack
description: Increases Spike ability of Quick Attack players.

name: Power Attack
description: Increases Spike ability of Power Attack players.

name: Set
description: Increases Set ability of the player.

name: Awareness
description: Increases player’s chances of performing Critical Servers, Spikes, or Sets.

name: Strength
description: Increases the power of player’s Critical Servers, Spikes, or Sets.

name: Attack Technique
description: Increases the power of players’ Serves, Spikes, or Sets.

name: Save
description: Increases the chance of preventing a potential loss point.

name: Reflex
description: Increases players’ chance of performing Critical Receives, Blocks, or Saves.

name: Spirit
description: Increases the power of players’ Critical Receives, Blocks, or Saves.

name: Defense Technique
description: Increases the power of players’ Receives, Blocks, or Saves.
